name: Pfeffernuesse: (Pepper Nuts or Ginger-Bread Nuts)
recipeIngredient: 1 tsp each cinnamon, cloves and nutmeg [ground]
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat together the eggs and sugar until light.
2. Sift together the dry ingredients and add the crushed hartshorn crystals.
3. Let dough stand overnight.
4. Form balls the size of a large walnut.
5. Make a thin mixture of powdered sugar and milk.
6. Brush the mixture on the cookies.
7. Flatten them slightly.
8. Bake at 300°F until brown, possibly 20 minutes.
